'''zajosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeaxanthine|zeaxanthine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeaxanthine|zeaxanthine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zajosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjesheth|zæjesheth]] || [[word:zæjeshej|zæjeshej]] || [[word:zæjeshesh|zæjeshesh]] || [[word:zæjeshe|zæjeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajojoshoth|zajojoshoth]] || [[word:zajojoshoj|zajojoshoj]] || [[word:zajojoshosh|zajojoshosh]] || [[word:zajojosho|zajojosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajoshoth|zajoshoth]] || [[word:zajoshoj|zajoshoj]] || [[word:zajoshosh|zajoshosh]] || [[word:zajosho|zajosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajofshoth|zajofshoth]] || [[word:zajofshoj|zajofshoj]] || [[word:zajofshosh|zajofshosh]] || [[word:zajofshof|zajofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zajoshotho|zajoshotho]] || [[word:zajoshojo|zajoshojo]] || [[word:zajoshosho|zajoshosho]] || [[word:zajoshoko|zajoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zajoshoth|zajoshoth]] || [[word:zajoshoj|zajoshoj]] || [[word:zajoshosh|zajoshosh]] || [[word:zajosho|zajosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zajoshothol|zajoshothol]] || [[word:zajoshojol|zajoshojol]] || [[word:zajoshoshol|zajoshoshol]] || [[word:zajoshokol|zajoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zajoshothotho|zajoshothotho]] || [[word:zajoshojojo|zajoshojojo]] || [[word:zajoshoshosho|zajoshoshosho]] || [[word:zajoshoko|zajoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zajoshothon|zajoshothon]] || [[word:zajoshojon|zajoshojon]] || [[word:zajoshoshon|zajoshoshon]] || [[word:zajoshokon|zajoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zajoshothoro|zajoshothoro]] || [[word:zajoshojoro|zajoshojoro]] || [[word:zajoshoshoro|zajoshoshoro]] || [[word:zajoshokoro|zajoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
